data.raw:
PRIMARY_TONE: SARDONIC/MELANCHOLIC
TONE_RANGE: WIDE — The author shifts from a melancholic tone to one of cheerfulness and hopefulness.
EMOTIONAL_DEPTH: SURFACE — While the text does convey some emotional undertones, it mostly stays on the surface level.
ATMOSPHERIC_WORDS: Words like "melancholy", "cheerlessness", "gloom", "softened pain", and "bitter" create a somber atmosphere.
TONE_SHIFTS: The author shifts tone in response to changes in the recipient's emotional state, as well as through their own interactions. For example, when describing Emma's return of spirits after a gloomy night, the tone becomes more hopeful.
